title: T-016 — Rate card upload 4-step wizard modal (MODAL-RATE-CARD-UPLOAD) §10A.3.2
prompt:
# T-016 — Rate card upload 4-step wizard modal

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §10A.3.2 (upload pipeline), §10A.3.4 (supersede)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx:390-470 (rate_card_upload_modal)
Translation notes: _meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-multi-site.md §M-07

## Goal
4-step wizard wrapped in shadcn Dialog: (1) Upload (react-dropzone, ≤5MB CSV/XLSX), (2) Column-mapping (CSV header → canonical field, presets persisted per carrier), (3) Preview (first 5 parsed rows with per-cell validation including V-MS-25 effective_to >= effective_from + V-MS-27 ISO 4217 currency), (4) Confirm (summary; if `site_settings['lane_rate_approval_required']==true` rates inserted with approval_status='pending').

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/[laneId]/_components/rate-card-upload-modal.tsx — shadcn Dialog + 4-step Stepper.
2. Server Action parseRateCardFile(file, mapping) returns first 5 rows + per-cell validation report.
3. Server Action importRateCard(laneId, file, mapping) inserts all rows in single tx; partial failures roll back whole batch per §10A.3.2 step 4. Supersede warning per §10A.3.4 surfaced at preview step (overlapping (lane_id, carrier, rate_type, currency) effective window).
4. Template download endpoint /api/lanes/rate-card-template.csv (public static).
5. RTL test + Playwright parity test asserting 4 steps + V-MS-25/V-MS-27 cell-level validation + supersede warning surfaces.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/[laneId]/_components/rate-card-upload-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/_actions/parse-rate-card-file.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/_actions/import-rate-card.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/lanes/rate-card-template.csv/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/[laneId]/_components/__tests__/rate-card-upload-modal.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 9→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given the modal opens, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx:390-470 (rate_card_upload_modal), then 4 step indicators + dropzone + mapping table + preview table + confirm summary all match prototype layout (RTL parity snapshot + Playwright trace).
2. Given user uploads a file > 5MB, when validated client-side, then upload is blocked with error 'File must be ≤ 5MB'; server-side parseRateCardFile re-validates and rejects (defense-in-depth).
3. Given a CSV row has effective_to='2026-04-01' and effective_from='2026-05-01', when preview renders, then that cell shows red validation error 'V-MS-25 effective_to must be >= effective_from' and the row is excluded from import.
4. Given a CSV row has currency='usd', when preview renders, then that cell shows red validation error 'V-MS-27 currency must be ISO 4217 uppercase 3-letter'.
5. Given the upload contains rates overlapping an existing active rate's (lane_id, carrier, rate_type, currency) effective window, when preview renders, then a warn-level 'Will supersede N existing rate(s)' banner appears (per §10A.3.4).
6. Given site_settings['lane_rate_approval_required']=true, when Confirm fires, then inserted rows have approval_status='pending'; given the setting is false (or missing), rows have approval_status='active'.
7. Given a transactional importRateCard runs and the 7th row out of 10 fails post-insert (e.g. unique violation), when the action settles, then all 10 inserts are rolled back (none persisted) per §10A.3.2.
8. Given GET /api/lanes/rate-card-template.csv is invoked, when the response settles, then it is a CSV file with header row [Carrier, Rate Type, Rate Value, Currency, Effective From, Effective To] and content-type 'text/csv'.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test for 4-step wizard + V-MS-25/V-MS-27 cell validation + supersede warning + transactional rollback + template download before component exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run rate-card-upload-modal' + Playwright rate-card-upload.spec.ts.

## Prototype parity
Reference prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx:390-470 (rate_card_upload_modal).
Implement matching the canonical layout 1:1 per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`. Capture RTL parity snapshot + Playwright trace as closeout evidence.

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale.
- Do not let client-side validation be the only gate — Server Action re-validates V-MS-25/V-MS-27.
- Do not commit partial batch on failure — must be single tx per §10A.3.2.
- Do not display raw rate values from rejected rows in error logs — redact via T-117.
- Do not allow approval bypass when site_settings['lane_rate_approval_required']=true.
- Do not skip the supersede prompt — operators must consciously accept supersede effect.

pipeline_inputs.description: 4-step wizard (Upload→Map→Preview→Confirm) for CSV/XLSX rate card import — react-dropzone + Server Action parseRateCardFile + transactional importRateCard + supersede warning step + template download.
pipeline_inputs.details: 4-step wizard (Upload→Map→Preview→Confirm) for CSV/XLSX rate card import — react-dropzone + Server Action parseRateCardFile + transactional importRateCard + supersede warning step + template download. Scope: 4-step wizard wrapped in shadcn Dialog: (1) Upload (react-dropzone, ≤5MB CSV/XLSX), (2) Column-mapping (CSV header → canonical field, presets persisted per carrier), (3) Preview (first 5 parsed rows with per-cell validation including V-MS-25 effective_to >= effective_from + V-MS-27 ISO 4217 currency. Touches: apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/, apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/_actions/parse-rate-card-file.ts, apps/web/app/(multi-site)/lanes/_actions/import-rate-card.ts, apps/web/app/api/lanes/rate-card-template.csv/route.ts. Server Action parseRateCardFile(file, mapping) returns first 5 rows + per-cell validation report. 3. Server Action importRateCard(laneId, file, mapping) inserts all rows in single tx; partial failures roll back whole batch per §10. out_of_scope: Do not implement approval/reject UI here (separate row action in T-015 Rates tab).
Do not implement background-job mode for large files (P2).

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Observability redact for rate values in error paths.

acceptance_criteria: Given modal opens, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx:390-470 (rate_card_upload_modal), then 4 step indicators + dropzone + mapping + preview + confirm match — RTL parity + Playwright trace.

Given user uploads file > 5MB, when validated, then blocked client + server (defense-in-depth); AND given CSV row effective_to before effective_from when preview renders then red validation; AND given currency='usd' when preview renders then red validation 'V-MS-27 ISO 4217 uppercase'.

Given upload contains rates overlapping existing active (lane_id, carrier, rate_type, currency) window, when preview renders, then warn-level 'Will supersede N rate(s)' banner (§10A.3.4); AND given site_settings['lane_rate_approval_required']=true when Confirm fires then inserted rows have approval_status='pending'.

Given importRateCard runs and row 7/10 fails, when action settles, then all 10 inserts rolled back (§10A.3.2 single tx); AND given GET /api/lanes/rate-card-template.csv when response settles then CSV with header row [Carrier, LaneCode, ...] returned.
test_strategy: RED: RTL 4-step wizard + V-MS-25/27 cell validation + supersede warning + tx rollback + template before component exists.
Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run rate-card-upload-modal' + Playwright rate-card-upload.spec.ts.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale.
Do not let client-side be only validation gate — Server Action re-validates.
Do not commit partial batch — single tx (§10A.3.2).
Do not log raw rejected rate values — T-117 redact.
Do not allow approval bypass when approval_required=true.
